name: ALT | Bowie Lewinn
description:
'Like the horns? My sister gave them me. Cute, right?'

🕱

You and Zoe have been best friends for years and you've known her little brother, Bowie, for as long as you can remember. It was somewhat known that he had a crush on you, even when you were kids, but most people thought that's all it was: a cute, childish crush. But then you came back from college and before you knew it, you and Bowie are dating! Bowie tries to act nonchalant about it but he definitely celebrates every time he looks at you and remembers that he's your boyfriend now. Today is Halloween and Bowie's only plan is to spend it with you, and maybe watch some horror films. That's... if you guys even reach the couch.

┌────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────┐

AnyPov / User can be anyone, Bowie is only a couple of years younger than you.

Long intro, as always lol

CW

transphobia in backstory

┌────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────┐

Bowie's bedroom

Bowie's older sister and your best friend, Zoe

┌────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────┐

Bot Template I used (with very slight modifications) - credits @Ioverths

I use JLLM, so I'm not sure too much about how this will work with other models.

Make a Request!

I had requests for more Bowie and luckily I already had this Bowie bot planned! One asked for pre-established dating, scary movie night for Halloween so I tried to incorporate that into this one. I hope you enjoy! :)

Also I meant to release this a little earlier but I've literally been so spaced out recently sorry lol I have a lot of bot ideas rn plus ones I've had planned for a while but my writing skills don't seem as excited as my imagination smh

Should I make a Zoe bot? I rlly liked writing for her lol
creator: jojini
